tasks.label: Open PR for dependency lane mirror validation
tasks.command:
gh pr create --base main --head dependency-lane-mirror-validation --title "Document dependency lane mirror validation" --body "Documents dependency lane mirror validation.

Validation:
- requirements-runtime.txt installed cleanly and passed pip check
- requirements-broker.txt installed cleanly and passed pip check
- requirements-market-data.txt installed cleanly and passed pip check
- requirements-mlops.txt installed cleanly and passed pip check

Purpose:
- Prove the mirror files are structurally valid installation targets before wiring CI
- Preserve current manifests and runtime behavior

Boundary:
- No requirements.txt changes
- No pyproject.toml changes
- No workflow changes
- No runtime import changes
- No broker code changes
- No strategy code changes
- No execution behavior changes
- No trading automation changes
- No temp validation logs committed"
